scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend/api-gateway && npm install --prefix backend/auth-service && npm install --prefix backend/listing-service && npm install --prefix backend/swap-service && npm install --prefix backend/user-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npx concurrently --kill-others "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:listing" "npm run start:swap" "npm run start:user" "npm run start:frontend"
